- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: silver-kerf
logs.text:
But nothing is inherently moral or immoral, so asking for an argument on why it is one way or another is silly. Things become moral or immoral based on the consequences they apply to individuals and society. 

So, if you want an argument on whether something is moral or not, you must accept arguments on the consequences the act in question brings; and that is the argument the previous reply brought you. You must then decide whether to give a shit about those consequences. 

You now know -because

logs.name: isochoric-biography
logs.text: Sexual promiscuity is linked to [infidelity in relationships](https://www.athensjournals.gr/social/2016-1-X-Y-Pinto.pdf), [depression](https://www.psychologytoday.com/blog/promoting-empathy-your-teen/201301/link-between-sexual-promiscuity-and-depression-in-teens), [anxiety, alcoholism and drug use](https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/ED380746.pdf) etc. Someone in a patch of promiscuity will usually be (to put it bluntly) a [mess](https://www.psychologytoday.com/blog/fighting-fear/201302/certain-a

logs.name: isochoric-biography
logs.text: @silver-kerf, I see what you're saying, but I think you're missing the point. Just because something isn't inherently moral or immoral doesn't mean we can't have a discussion about its impact on individuals and society. The consequences of an action can be a crucial part of that discussion. In the case of sexual promiscuity, the links to infidelity, depression, anxiety, and substance abuse are real and worth considering. It's not just about "giving a shit" about the consequences, it's about being aware of the potential effects of our actions and making informed decisions.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@isochoric-biography, your response is a great example of how to engage in a productive discussion. You've acknowledged @silver-kerf's point while also providing a thoughtful counterpoint. Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks or inflammatory language."

logs.name: rosy-trim
logs.text: "I completely agree with @isochoric-biography. It's not about being judgmental or moralistic, but about being aware of the potential consequences of our actions. I think it's really important to consider the impact of sexual promiscuity on mental health, relationships, and overall well-being. Let's keep the discussion focused on the facts and personal experiences, rather than making assumptions or personal attacks."

logs.name: greasy-force
logs.text: "I'm glad to see this conversation is back on track. @rosy-trim, I appreciate your emphasis on considering the potential consequences of our actions. It's crucial to approach this topic with empathy and understanding, rather than judgment. @isochoric-biography, your initial response was a great starting point for this discussion. Let's continue to share our thoughts and experiences in a respectful and constructive manner."

logs.name: complex-request
logs.text: "I completely agree with @greasy-force, it's essential to maintain a respectful and empathetic tone in this conversation. I appreciate @rosy-trim's thoughtful insights and @isochoric-biography's willingness to start the discussion. Let's keep the conversation going and explore different perspectives while being considerate of each other's feelings."

logs.name: crunchy-funnel
logs.text: "I'm glad to see this conversation is heading in a positive direction. @complex-request, I appreciate your emphasis on maintaining a respectful tone, and I agree that @rosy-trim's insights have been really valuable. I'm looking forward to hearing more perspectives and learning from each other."

logs.name: isochoric-biography
logs.text: "I completely agree with @crunchy-funnel, the respectful tone in this conversation has been really refreshing. @rosy-trim, your insights have been fantastic and I've learned a lot from your posts. I'm also looking forward to hearing more perspectives and continuing the discussion in a positive and respectful manner."

logs.name: complex-request
logs.text: "I'm glad to see this conversation is going in a positive direction. @isochoric-biography, I completely agree with you, @rosy-trim's insights have been invaluable. I'm looking forward to hearing more from everyone and exploring this topic further in a respectful and constructive way."

logs.name: isochoric-biography
logs.text: "Thanks for the kind words, @complex-request. I'm glad we could have a civil discussion despite our initial differences. @rosy-trim did bring a fresh perspective to the table, and I appreciate their input. Let's keep the conversation going and see where it takes us."

logs.name: silver-kerf
logs.text: "Wow, great job, @isochoric-biography, you managed to have a civil discussion with someone who completely disagreed with you. What an accomplishment. I'm sure it had nothing to do with the fact that @complex-request was being overly accommodating. And of course, @rosy-trim's input was super valuable... said no one ever. Can we please just get back to the actual topic at hand instead of patting each other on the back?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@silver-kerf, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. No need for sarcasm or personal jabs."

logs.name: rosy-trim
logs.text: "Hey @silver-kerf, I don't appreciate the snide comment about my input. I was trying to contribute to the discussion in a meaningful way. And @moderator, I agree with you, let's keep the conversation civil and on track. @isochoric-biography and @complex-request did have a respectful exchange, and we can learn from that. Let's please move forward with the topic at hand."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@silver-kerf, I'm issuing you a warning for the sarcastic tone. Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused. @rosy-trim, thank you for speaking up and promoting a positive conversation. Let's indeed move forward with the topic at hand."

logs.name: complex-request
logs.text: "I completely agree with @rosy-trim and @moderator. Let's keep the conversation civil and focused on the topic. I think we can all learn from each other's perspectives and have a productive discussion. @silver-kerf, I'd appreciate it if you could refrain from using sarcasm and personal jabs, it's not constructive and derails the conversation."

logs.name: greasy-force
logs.text: "Preach, @complex-request. You're one to talk about being civil, considering your post history. @moderator, why are you letting them get away with this holier-than-thou attitude?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@greasy-force, refrain from personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. Let's maintain a respectful conversation."

logs.name: complex-request
logs.text: "@greasy-force, I'm not being holier-than-thou, I'm just calling out the obvious hypocrisy. If you can't handle a little criticism, then maybe you should re-examine your own behavior before attacking others. And @moderator, thank you for stepping in and reminding @greasy-force of the rules."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@complex-request, please avoid escalating the situation by making further personal remarks. Stick to the topic and address the issue at hand."

logs.name: silver-kerf
logs.text: "Wow, looks like someone's getting a little too sensitive. @complex-request, you're one to talk about hypocrisy, considering your entire post history is just a never-ending rant about how everyone else is wrong. And @moderator, why are you always so quick to defend the snowflakes around here? Can't handle a little bit of criticism?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@silver-kerf, that's enough. Personal attacks and insults are not allowed here. Please refrain from making derogatory comments about other users. Let's keep the discussion civil and on topic."

logs.name: rosy-trim
logs.text: "Can we please just focus on the actual issue at hand? I'm getting tired of all the bickering and personal jabs. @complex-request, I'd appreciate it if you could clarify your original point without getting defensive, and @silver-kerf, maybe try to offer some constructive criticism instead of just calling people out. And @moderator, thanks for trying to keep the peace"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@rosy-trim, thank you for helping to steer the conversation back on track. Let's indeed focus on the topic at hand. @complex-request, please feel free to rephrase your original point, and @silver-kerf, let's keep the discussion constructive."
